name: Potato Soup for Crockpot
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Flour mixed with 1/2 Cup Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ingredients 1 through 8 in the crockpot.
2. Cook on low to medium setting for all day.
3. About 30 minutes to one hour before serving, add milk and flour-water mixture.
4. Stir until the soup thickens and is ready to serve.
NOTE: For a cheesy version of this soup, add 1/4 pound of Velveeta cheese just before serving. Regular milk can be substituted with evaporated milk.
